jangma.reason: 비 선이 요청된 '매우 빽빽한' 수준으로 밀집되어 있지 않아 장마의 폭우를 충분히 표현하지 못합니다.

reasons: Image depicts the Korean word '분래' instead of '먼저'. It also contains text, a medal, and the number '1', all explicitly forbidden.

sagakhyeong.reason: 이미지는 둥근 모서리와 얼굴을 가지고 있어 사각형의 정의에 맞지 않습니다.

reasons: The milk carton has an apple drawing on it, and is not completely blank white as required.

reasons: The yellow section on the glue stick, even without text, appears to be a label area, which contradicts the requirement for a completely blank and smooth cylinder with no labels of any kind.

chuk.reason: 이미지는 팽이 전체를 보여주며, 축(중심 막대)만을 명확하게 나타내지 않습니다.

heoritti.reason: 이미지에 바느질선과 구멍이 상세하게 묘사되어 있어, '완전히 평평하고 구멍이 없는 매끄러운 가죽'이라는 설명과 일치하지 않습니다.

reasons: The image contains text (N, W, E, S) which was explicitly forbidden.

heeopin.reason: 이미지에 리본 장식이 있는 헤어핀이 있어 의도된 의미와 다릅니다.

reasons: The image includes an apple, which was explicitly forbidden in the instructions for depicting '늪'.

reasons: The image looks more like a cartoon octopus character or a toy rather than a food item. It lacks the texture and appearance of a baked or fried snack, which is essential for "문어빵".
muneoppang.reason: 이 이미지는 문어빵이 아닌 일반 문어 캐릭터처럼 보입니다. 빵의 질감이나 음식의 느낌이 부족합니다.

reasons: The image shows two postcards instead of just one. The lines on the back of the postcard could be interpreted as writing.

reasons: The image contains an apple, which was explicitly forbidden. The stylized grass blades strongly resemble the letter 'M' and the number '3', which can be confusing for a toddler.

reasons: The image contains a car and apples, which are not part of a simple night sky scene and were explicitly forbidden in the prompt.
